channel.title: morningNewsPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: King Charles heads to White House as US marks 250 years
item.description: First state visit by a British king since George VI.

item.title: Mamdani's racial equity plan called 'goalpost move' by expert
item.description: Critics say NYC mayor's plan justifies massive government intervention.

item.title: After Trump shooting, CEOs need new security playbook
item.description: Also: News and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: A manifesto, train ride, and security gaps let shooter near Trump
item.description: What you need to know before reaching the office.
